'''dachïfdhïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphitis|nymphitis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphitis|nymphitis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dachïfdhïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || dæchïfdhïfth || dæchïfdhïfj || dæchïfdhïfsh || dæchïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || dachïfchïfdhïfth || dachïfchïfdhïfj || dachïfchïfdhïfsh || dachïfchïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || dachïfdhïfth || dachïfdhïfj || dachïfdhïfsh || dachïfdhïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || dachïffdhïffth || dachïffdhïffj || dachïffdhïffsh || dachïffdhïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dachïfdhïfïf || dachïfdhïfïf || dachïfdhïfïf || dachïfdhïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || dachïfdhïfth || dachïfdhïfj || dachïfdhïfsh || dachïfdhïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dachïfdhïfïfl || dachïfdhïfïfl || dachïfdhïfïfl || dachïfdhïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dachïfdhïfïfïf || dachïfdhïfïfïf || dachïfdhïfïfïf || dachïfdhïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || dachïfdhïfïfn || dachïfdhïfïfn || dachïfdhïfïfn || dachïfdhïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dachïfdhïfïforo || dachïfdhïfïforo || dachïfdhïfïforo || dachïfdhïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
